title: Vetinari SHARD Frontmatter Schema

name.description: Shard filename stem without the .md extension.

plan_type.description: Generated-plan discriminator; SHARD files must use agent-shard.

kind.description: Work-instruction kind that selects the required evidence contract.

owned_write_scope.description: Files or directories the shard may modify.

verification_commands.description: Commands the worker or coordinator must run to prove completion.

adr_refs.description: Accepted ADR identifiers that authorize or constrain the shard.

research_questions.description: Questions a discovery shard must answer before implementation work exists.

sources_to_consult.description: Primary repo, local, or external sources that bound discovery work.

deliverable_artifact_path.description: Path where a discovery shard records its evidence-backed result.

stop_conditions.description: Conditions under which discovery must stop and report back.

hypothesis.description: The falsifiable claim a spike is testing.

success_criteria.description: Concrete outcomes that would promote or keep the spike result.

fail_criteria.description: Concrete outcomes that prove the spike should be deleted or abandoned.

scope_limit_files.description: Maximum file set the spike may touch.

scope_limit_loc.description: Maximum line-count budget for throwaway spike code.

promotion_or_deletion_step.description: Required next action that either promotes the spike into planned work or deletes it.

named_invariant.description: Behavior-preserving invariant a refactor must protect.

regression_test_set.description: Tests that must pass before and after the refactor.

no_new_public_api_confirmation.description: True only when the refactor introduces no new public API surface.

legacy_path.description: Existing path, behavior, or storage location being migrated away from.

new_path.description: Target path, behavior, or storage location after migration.

default_runtime_statement.description: Statement of which runtime remains default during and after cutover.

cutover_criterion.description: Observable condition that allows the migration to flip defaults or remove the old path.

routing_manifest.description: Path to the routing manifest used for model and agent validation.

agent.description: Declared worker agent for the shard.

effort.description: Declared reasoning effort for the shard.

parallel_group.description: Parallel execution group for dependency-safe scheduling.

depends_on.description: Shard, session, or external dependency list required before execution.

evidence.description: Evidence pointers the shard must use or produce.

anti_goals.description: Explicit non-goals that prevent scope creep or known failure modes.

entity.description: Semantic entity or symbol that bounds the pre-assembled context excerpt.

file.description: Repo-relative file path passed to sem context for this bundle item.

budget_tokens.description: Maximum token budget requested from sem context for this bundle item.

context_bundle.description: Optional pre-assembled context bundle entries resolved before worker dispatch.

orchestrator_model.description: Model declared for parent orchestration context inherited by generated shards.

orchestrator_effort.description: Reasoning effort declared for parent orchestration context inherited by generated shards.

default_worker_model.description: Default worker model inherited from the generated-plan template.

default_worker_effort.description: Default worker effort inherited from the generated-plan template.

mechanical_worker_model.description: Mechanical worker model inherited from the generated-plan template.

mechanical_worker_effort.description: Mechanical worker effort inherited from the generated-plan template.

reviewer_model.description: Reviewer model inherited from the generated-plan template.

reviewer_effort.description: Reviewer effort inherited from the generated-plan template.

codex_default_model.description: Codex default model inherited from the generated-plan template.

codex_mechanical_model.description: Codex mechanical model inherited from the generated-plan template.

codex_terminal_model.description: Codex terminal model inherited from the generated-plan template.

codex_reviewer_model.description: Codex reviewer model inherited from the generated-plan template.

codex_architect_model.description: Codex architect model inherited from the generated-plan template.

description: Open by design: frontmatter carries routing and governance metadata (orchestrator_model, default_worker_model, etc.) that evolves independently of this validator. Unknown root keys are surfaced as SHARD-005 warnings rather than schema errors so new metadata fields do not break existing shards.
